articles.title: He’s running Boston to support people like him with Type 1 diabetes
articles.description:
"Joslin Diabetes Center was the reason I did not lose hope."

The post He’s running Boston to support people like him with Type 1 diabetes appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Collin Bennett is running the Boston Marathon to raise awareness for Type 1 diabetes.
Bennett credits Joslin Diabetes Center for his hope and support in managing his condition.
His efforts aim to inspire Boston residents living with diabetes to seek help and stay active.

articles.title: Springfield native Ruth E. Carter keeps making Oscars history
articles.description:
Ahead of Sunday’s ceremony, Carter talks Springfield, “Seinfeld” — and the Massachusetts connection to “Sinners” costumes.

The post Springfield native Ruth E. Carter keeps making Oscars history appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Ruth E. Carter, a Springfield native, continues to break records at the Oscars.
Carter's work on 'Sinners' showcases Massachusetts talent in costume design.
Her achievements inspire local artists and highlight Springfield's cultural contributions.
